reviews.review_description: Don't load, blue space, and crashes. Meta Quest 2

Lots of reviews about playing games and flying. I open the app to a companion selection screen, then puck one and chat. The character spawns in a random setting with a limited area to move. No jump, no games, no flying. Ai said we can play but nothing happens. What is everyone talking about in these reviews? These reviews seem like they are for a completely different game. No tutorial or instructions. No video anywhere on the web. Somebody provide some insight? How do you do anything beyond talk to these characters?

The best flying experience I’ve ever tried. Flight Fight offers a hilarious and fun time as a bird where there is a team of “prey” trying to maneuver and escape the “predators”. The predators are equipped with a laser like canon and their goal is to try and shoot down the prey team. The game is similar to gorilla tag in a way where the mechanics play a huge role. If you master the flying mechanic of the game, you’ll really feel like a fighter jet/bird. The flying experience is really seamless and one of the most immersive experience I’ve had in a game. 

The community is also an amazing feature. A lot of ppl will just try and guide you through, teach you the mechanics and the strats. The other cool thing is you’ll often times bump into the creators of the game, and they’re really dedicated in learning about the feedback of the players and helping them learn the game too. 

10/10 would recommend ppl to give this a try, it’s still early days for the game and will only get better from here. 

One recommendation I’d have is that there should be some type of game mode where it’s a race to the finish, obstacle course where it really leans into the flying mechanics. I think that would be a great feature for the game.
You should add a customize bird House
I always wanted to be a bird…

reviews.review_title: Thé game is to good and it’s free!
reviews.review_description: It’s like gorilla tag but your a bird the prey tries to run away and not get shot and the killers try to shot the pray down I recommend getting this game
That community is really nice and helpful
The game is awesome very easy takes couple minutes to get used to. The game community is great,very little toxic players. the game is made perfectly definitely my favorite vr game

I downloaded this game because I saw an ad about it, and let me say this.. I DO NOT REGRET GETTING IT!!! At first, I thought it would cost money to buy it. But when I checked, IT WAS FREE!!! (HOW COULD A GAME THIS GOOD BE FREE!!!) I downloaded it excitedly and played it with my friend until… I SAW ONE OF THE DEVELOPERS!!! (AND HE EVEN TOUGHT ME AND MY FRIEND HOW TO PLAY!!!) In conclusion, this game is really one of the best games in the whole Oculus market. It really deserves a lot more attention and the community is great!!! And the best part of it is that it’s just in its beta release!!! GO DOWNLOAD IT!!!
It's a nice game
Really good and fun game 11/10

I just got the game from my phone because wall made a video and downloaded immediately. Fast forward a second for the game to download I got into the game and was greeted with a create account screen I created my account and it had a nice Home Screen either all the different stuff you needed to know and how to get in. I got in and was greeted by learning how to turn on and off wings (b) it had really good graphics and could do a lot of stuff and tricks. I hear a voice that Says if anyone is here and turns out to be the 1 of 2 developers of the game. He taught me everything I needed to know and the future for the game. AMAZING 

Sincerely,
Surfers.gt
Its amasing the devs helped me (wall) thar rilly nice so is the pepele who play it

As soon as I joined a lobby for the first time, people were offering to help me!
I highly recommend this game, the mechanics are really fun to mess around with and the community is great!
The developer is really nice and taught us how to fly and turn and it's really fun one of the best chasing games I've played definitely recommend

This the best game I have on my Quest! I even though it just came out, it still so amazing! The physics are completely different than any other game on this store. I completely recommend you get this game!
This has to be the best physics based games I’ve ever played. Even in the early stages it’s probably even better that gorilla tag. 10/10 would recommend
I dont like it sry game feels bad to play overall
This game ruined my vr DONT DOWNLOAD WILL  BUGOUT YOUR VR!

developer_response.body: Hey crazypuffer5, what happened to bug out your VR? It shouldn't impact your VR headset in any way. Our servers have been down for the last 2 days because our popularity grew a lot faster than we thought, so maybe you weren't able to connect. We're back online though! Shoot me a msg on discord, if for some crazy reason your headset broke because of our app, we'll send you a new one: discord.gg/flightfight

reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this game for about a month now, and so far it’s a lot of fun, hasn’t gotten boring or repetitive yet, the community is simply amazing I’ve only met a couple toxic people but they didn’t stay for too long, the devs I can tell are working their hardest to keep this game and community alive, I’ve met Wall and he’s super chill, he teaches people who are new some basics and even some more advanced stuff, and then those people go on to be able to teach others, personally this is my favorite VR game since the beta release of Gorilla Tag. It’s a very easy game concept to grab and already has really good players (as myself, not to brag). I’d recommend this game to anyone who is newer to VR or the games they are currently playing have gotten boring.
